ucs.title: [LLM] APT3 (Gothic Panda/Buckeye) accessibility-features RDP backdoor via IFEO Debugger hijack
ucs.description: Hunts the signature APT3/Buckeye persistence trick of redirecting Windows accessibility binaries (sethc.exe sticky-keys, utilman.exe, osk.exe, narrator.exe, magnify.exe, displayswitch.exe) to cmd/powershell via the Image File Execution Options 'Debugger' value or by replacing the binary on disk — granting SYSTEM shell at the pre-auth RDP/console logon screen.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Registry.registry_path) as registry_path values(Registry.registry_value_data) as registry_value_data values(Registry.process_name) as process_name values(Registry.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Registry where Registry.registry_path="*\\Microsoft\\Windows NT\\CurrentVersion\\Image File Execution Options\\*" (Registry.registry_path="*sethc.exe*" OR Registry.registry_path="*utilman.exe*" OR Registry.registry_path="*osk.exe*" OR Registry.registry_path="*narrator.exe*" OR Registry.registry_path="*magnify.exe*" OR Registry.registry_path="*displayswitch.exe*" OR Registry.registry_path="*atbroker.exe*" OR Registry.registry_path="*HelpPane.exe*") Registry.registry_value_name="Debugger" by Registry.dest Registry.user Registry.registry_path Registry.registry_value_name Registry.registry_value_data Registry.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Registry)` | where match(registry_value_data,"(?i)(cmd\.exe|powershell(_ise)?\.exe|rundll32\.exe|cscript\.exe|wscript\.exe|mshta\.exe|\\Temp\\|\\AppData\\|\\ProgramData\\|\\Public\\)") | append [| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Filesystem.file_path) as file_path values(Filesystem.process_name) as process_name from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where Filesystem.action="modified" (Filesystem.file_name="sethc.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="utilman.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="osk.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="narrator.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="magnify.exe" OR Filesystem.file_name="displayswitch.exe") Filesystem.file_path="*\\System32\\*" by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user Filesystem.file_path Filesystem.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)` | where process_name!="TrustedInstaller.exe" AND process_name!="TiWorker.exe"] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let suspicious_debuggers = dynamic(["cmd.exe","powershell.exe","powershell_ise.exe","rundll32.exe","cscript.exe","wscript.exe","mshta.exe"]);
let accessibility_bins = dynamic(["sethc.exe","utilman.exe","osk.exe","narrator.exe","magnify.exe","displayswitch.exe","atbroker.exe","helppane.exe"]);
let ifeo_hijack = DeviceRegistryEvents
| where ActionType in ("RegistryValueSet","RegistryKeyCreated")
| where RegistryKey has @"\Microsoft\Windows NT\CurrentVersion\Image File Execution Options\"
| where RegistryValueName =~ "Debugger"
| extend hijacked = tolower(tostring(split(RegistryKey,"\\")[-1]))
| where hijacked in (accessibility_bins)
| where RegistryValueData has_any (suspicious_debuggers) or RegistryValueData has_any (@"\Temp\", @"\AppData\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, hijacked, RegistryKey, RegistryValueData, ReportId;
let binary_swap = DeviceFileEvents
| where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified","FileRenamed")
| where FolderPath has @"\System32\" or FolderPath has @"\SysWOW64\"
| where FileName in~ (accessibility_bins)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("TrustedInstaller.exe","TiWorker.exe","msiexec.exe","poqexec.exe")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, FolderPath, FileName, SHA256, ReportId;
union ifeo_hijack, binary_swap
| join kind=leftouter (DeviceLogonEvents | where LogonType in ("RemoteInteractive","Network") | summarize logon_count=count(), logon_users=make_set(AccountName,25) by DeviceName, bin(Timestamp,1d)) on DeviceName
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: FireEye and Symantec both attribute the sticky-keys/utilman IFEO Debugger backdoor to APT3/Buckeye as a hallmark of Operation Clandestine Fox/Wolf intrusions — the group plants this so a stolen RDP credential (or even pre-auth Shift x5 at the logon screen) yields a SYSTEM cmd. Legitimate writes to IFEO Debugger keys for these specific accessibility binaries are vanishingly rare outside debugging t

ucs.title: [LLM] APT3 SHOTPUT/Pirpi loader: rundll32 spawned by browser/Office or scheduled task with C2 egress
ucs.description: Hunts the APT3 post-exploitation execution chain seen in Operation Clandestine Wolf and Double Tap: an IE/Flash 0-day or weaponized link spawns rundll32.exe loading a DLL (SHOTPUT / CookieCutter / Pirpi) from %TEMP%, %APPDATA%, %PROGRAMDATA% or C:\Users\Public\, often persisted via schtasks, which then beacons to a SOCKS-style C2 over non-standard ports (T1090.002 / T1095).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as process values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_path) as process_path values(Processes.user) as user from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name="rundll32.exe" (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("iexplore.exe","outlook.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","chrome.exe","firefox.exe","flashplayer*.exe","FlashUtil*.exe") OR Processes.process IN ("*\\AppData\\*","*\\Temp\\*","*\\ProgramData\\*","*\\Users\\Public\\*")) Processes.process="*.dll*" by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_id | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rex field=process "(?i)(?<dll_path>[a-z]:\\\\[^\"\s]+\.dll)[,\s]+(?<export>[A-Za-z0-9_@]+)" | join type=inner dest process_id [| tstats summariesonly=true values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as c2_ip values(All_Traffic.dest_port) as c2_port sum(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.app="rundll32.exe" All_Traffic.dest_category!="internal" by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.process_id | rename All_Traffic.src as dest All_Traffic.process_id as process_id] | where bytes_out > 1024 | table firstTime lastTime dest user parent_process_name process dll_path export c2_ip c2_port bytes_out | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let exploit_parents = dynamic(["iexplore.exe","outlook.exe","winword.exe","excel.exe","powerpnt.exe","chrome.exe","firefox.exe","flashutil_activex.exe","flashplayer.exe","flashplayerplugin.exe"]);
let user_writable = dynamic([@"\appdata\",@"\temp\",@"\programdata\",@"\users\public\",@"\downloads\"]);
let rundll_loads =
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where FileName =~ "rundll32.exe"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (exploit_parents)
   or ProcessCommandLine has_any (user_writable)
| where ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\.dll[,\s\"']+[A-Za-z0-9_@]+"
| extend dll = extract(@"(?i)([A-Za-z]:\\[^\"]+\.dll)", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| extend export = extract(@"(?i)\.dll[\",\s]+([A-Za-z0-9_@]+)", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| project Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, ProcessId, dll, export;
let rundll_egress =
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "rundll32.exe"
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| where ActionType in ("ConnectionSuccess","ConnectionRequest")
| summarize bytes=sum(InitiatingProcessIntegrityLevel == "" and 0 or 0), c2_ips=make_set(RemoteIP,10), c2_ports=make_set(RemotePort,10), conn_count=count() by DeviceId, InitiatingProcessId, InitiatingProcessCreationTime, bin(Timestamp,1h);
rundll_loads
| join kind=inner (rundll_egress) on DeviceId, $left.ProcessId == $right.InitiatingProcessId
| join kind=leftouter (
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where FileName =~ "schtasks.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("/create","-create")
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("rundll32",".dll")
    | project sched_dev=DeviceId, sched_time=Timestamp, sched_cmd=ProcessCommandLine
) on $left.DeviceId == $right.sched_dev
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, ProcessCommandLine, dll, export, c2_ips, c2_ports, conn_count, sched_cmd
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.rationale: APT3's documented exploit chains (CVE-2014-1776 IE UAF in Clandestine Fox, CVE-2015-3113 Flash UAF in Clandestine Wolf, CVE-2014-6332 in Double Tap) all converge on the same execution stub: rundll32.exe loading a SHOTPUT/Pirpi/CookieCutter DLL dropped under a user-writable directory, optionally pinned with a schtasks /create entry, then proxying C2 back out (FireEye/Recorded Future/Symantec report
